# Pull Request Checklist

## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Required checks

- [ ] I followed `docs/repo-change-checklist.md`.
- [ ] Documentation was updated or confirmed not required.
- [ ] `docs/index.html` was updated if the GitHub Pages landing page should expose this change.
- [ ] `README.md` was updated if the root inventory, setup, or core solution description changed.
- [ ] `tools/index.html` and `tools/README.md` were updated if tooling changed.
- [ ] `TODO.md` was updated if roadmap status or priorities changed.
- [ ] Sparse clone scripts were updated or confirmed not required.
- [ ] Changed scripts/tools were validated.
- [ ] No secrets, tenant IDs, customer data, or private PBIP artifacts were committed.

## Validation performed

List the commands, browser checks, or manual validations performed.
